caption:
Traveling to Japan in 2026? 🇯🇵✈️
Avoid these common mistakes that can easily ruin your trip.

Save this for later and follow for more Japan travel tips.

Learn more at jrailpass.com

#JapanTravelTips #Japan2026 #JapanRailPass #TravelSmart #VisitJapan
transcript: japan mistakes 2026 don't ruin your japan trip in 2026 nobody warns you about these mistakes one airport and connectivity first stop landing at narita haneda is way closer to tokyo and ditch the pocket wi-fi it's 2026 just get an e sim for instant data two luggage and cash taking the shinkansen large suits case require reserved seat now also japan is not cash only anymore apple pay and cash work almost everywhere three the jr pass is the jr pass worth it yes if you are hitting tokyo osaka and kyoto it saves massive time just get it from a trusted site like jrailpass.com save this for your 2026 trip and follow for more japan tips
